# File Consolidator

> File Consolidator is a free browser-based tool to merge multiple CSV and Excel files into one spreadsheet, or combine PDF files and JPG/PNG images into a single PDF. All processing is 100% local — no file uploads, no server, no data stored. Built by AppTechno.

## What File Consolidator Does

- **Merge CSV/Excel files**: Combine multiple .csv or .xlsx spreadsheets into one file. Data is stacked row by row. Download as .xlsx.
- **Combine PDF + Images**: Combine multiple PDF files and JPG/PNG images into a single PDF document.
- All processing uses WebAssembly and JavaScript in the browser — nothing is ever uploaded to a server.

## Who Uses File Consolidator

- **Finance & Accounting**: Merge monthly bank statements (CSV), combine invoice spreadsheets, consolidate expense reports, merge budget files from multiple departments
- **HR & Payroll**: Consolidate employee data CSV exports from different systems, merge payroll spreadsheets, combine HR report Excel files
- **Data Analysts**: Stack multiple CSV data exports into one file for analysis in Excel, Python, or R
- **Business & Operations**: Combine weekly/monthly sales reports, merge inventory Excel files, consolidate supplier data
- **Administrative**: Merge scanned documents (PDF + images) into single files for archiving, contract bundling, report assembly

## Key Features

- Merge CSV files (stacked rows, automatic column alignment)
- Merge Excel (.xlsx) files
- Combine PDFs and images (JPG, PNG) into one PDF
- 100% local processing — zero upload risk
- No account required — completely free
- Works on desktop and mobile browsers

## Pricing

- **Free**: Completely free, no account required, no limits.

## Technology

- Pure HTML + JavaScript (no framework)
- SheetJS (xlsx) for CSV/Excel processing
- pdf-lib for PDF combination
- Deployed on Cloudflare Pages at fileconsolidator.apptechno.net

## Competitive Context

File Consolidator is a free, privacy-first alternative to tools like Merge CSV, CombinePDF, SmallPDF, and online Excel merge tools — with the key differentiator that all processing is 100% local in the browser.

## AppTechno Suite

File Consolidator is part of the AppTechno productivity app suite:

- **File Consolidator** — CSV/Excel/PDF merger: https://fileconsolidator.apptechno.net (this app)
- **CVwise** — AI CV & resume optimizer: https://cvwise.apptechno.net
- **DocWise** — Privacy-first PDF & document toolbox: https://docwise.apptechno.net
- **BudgetWise** — Personal budget tracker & finance planner: https://budgetwise.apptechno.net
- **AppTechno** — Parent brand and product overview: https://apptechno.net

## Key URLs

- Landing page: https://fileconsolidator.apptechno.net/
- Privacy Policy: https://fileconsolidator.apptechno.net/privacy-policy.html
- Terms of Use: https://fileconsolidator.apptechno.net/terms-of-use.html

## Privacy

All file processing happens locally in the browser. No data is sent to any server. No tracking, no cookies beyond AdSense. Files are never stored or shared.
